title: Saratov, Saratov Oblast — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Saratov, Saratov Oblast: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Saratov is a city in Saratov Oblast with a population of 840,000. A major Volga River city and cultural center, home to the Saratov Conservatory and a historic university district.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
